title: NEROSHAD's Optimization Pack
body:
Just a small pack of optimizations and tweaks that NEROSHAD uses on his Minecraft streams/aruvi server.

<details><summary>List of mods</summary>

- **Mod Menu** - Adds a mod menu to view the list of mods you have installed.

- **Fabric API** - API for mods.

- **Sodium** - Modern rendering engine and client-side optimization.

- **LazyDFU** - Makes the game boot faster by deferring non-essential initialization.

- **Lithium** - Game logic/server optimization mod.

- **Starlight** - Rewrites the light engine to fix lighting performance and lighting errors.

- **Memory Leak Fix** - Fixes random memory leaks for both the client and server.

- **FerriteCore** - Memory usage optimizations.

- **Iris Shaders** - Mostly because it adds shader support.

- **LambDynamicLights** - A dynamic lights mod so you can walk with your lighted torch.

- **Simple Voice Chat** - A proximity voice chat to the Minecraft server.
</details>


<details><summary>Resource Pack Tweaks 1.20.1</summary>

**Completely optional!** You can activate it by going to Resource Packs tab and use the NEROSHAD Resource Pack.

- Sildurs Extreme Shaders

- Custom NEROSHAD Totem

- What Spyglass Meme

- Item Stitching Fix

- Big Dripleaf Fix

- Small Dripleaf Fix

- Iron Bars Fix

- Blazes Fix

- Nicer Fast Leaves

- Iron Golem Red Flowers

- Animated Campfire Item

- Unique Dyes

- Diminishing Tools

- Visual Sapling Growth

- Hunger Preview

- Borderless Glass

- Borderless Stained Glass

- Borderless Tinted Glass

- Lower Shield

- Old Damage Sounds

- Four-Angled Crosshair

- Ping Color Indicator

- Rainbow Experience

- Full Age Crop Marker

- Different Stems

- Dark UI

- Brewing Guide

</details>
